title: The Beginning and the End
writer: Salah Abouseif, Salah Erzine, Naguib Mahfouz
actors: Farid Shawqi, Omar Sharif, Aminah Rizq
plot: After the death of the father, the family consisting of a mother and two young men and a girl themselves without a breadwinner finds, to begin each of them in the direction to a different path, to err on the older brother (Hassan)...
